title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Surrounded by Big Sisters!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I beat them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect you to have blossomed to this
extent...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, I exercise caution against all my opponents,
and you were no different. I never underestimated
nor doubted your skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I lost for one reason only—because you are in full
bloom. Congratulations, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, seriously! You're not just a budding flower.
You're in peak bloom!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You won the Yasuda Kinen and the Takarazuka
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Not just anyone can do that. Your running was
magnificent.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're going to make me blush, everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, maybe you are just a cute little
flower! You're making me want to lay it on even
thicker.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There you go again... Your lack of self-awareness
is frankly frightening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We'll be taking our leave now. From hereon, this
place is solely for the victor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost today, but I look forward to the
next time we race, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it too! And by then...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll be as cool as all of you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I won the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Now I can run in all kinds of races!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's enter as many as we can!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That way, I'll be able to bury you in victory
bouquets!
